message:
fix(connector,runtime): replace panicking .expect() with Result propagation in rollback_bundle and lockstep_harness

rollback_bundle.rs:
- Add SerializationFailure error variant (ERR-RRB-SERIALIZATION) with
  context and reason fields for diagnosable serialization failures
- Extract encode_canonical_json() helper that converts serde errors into
  typed RollbackBundleError instead of panicking
- Convert canonical_bytes() and related methods from returning Vec<u8>
  (with .expect() panic) to returning Result<Vec<u8>, RollbackBundleError>
- Propagate serialization errors through the full bundle creation chain

lockstep_harness.rs:
- Replace .expect("invariant: stdout/stderr piped") with .ok_or_else()
  returning anyhow errors with descriptive runtime identification
- Ensures harness failures produce actionable error messages instead of
  panics when child process pipes are unexpectedly unavailable

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
